title: The Big Cheese Mega-Sonic® Solar Cat Repeller – Effective Humane Alternative - Professional Motion-Activated Ultrasonic Cat Repellent for Gardens UK - Outdoor Solar Powered Deterrent
features: ULTIMATE CAT REPELLER – Safeguard your outdoor space with the mega-sonic, solar cat repeller. This motion-activated device emits high-frequency sound bursts to deter cats without harm. Covering up to 60m², it provides effective protection

DAY & NIGHT OPERATION – Protect garden plants, veggies, flower beds and newly seeded lawns with this cat scarer that really works. Equipped with a built-in solar rechargeable power pack, it includes a USB charging port and 3 AA rechargeable batteries

SIMPLE INSTALLATION – The anti-cat garden repellent can be easily installed on a fence or wall using the fixing hole or placed in the ground with the provided stake. The outer casing is waterproof, and weather-tested to an IP44 rating

NO HARM, NO FUSS – Install the mega-sonic cat sensor in an open, unobstructed area. Allow up to 14-28 days to see the full deterrent effect, ensuring a pet-safe and poison-free solution that keeps your garden flourishing and free from cat damage

WILDLIFE CONTROL MADE EASY - The Big Cheese mega-sonic products provide continuous protection animals without poison. Safe for children and pets, they emit sound waves inaudible to humans, offering a humane solution for keeping animals away

Equipped with a PIR sensor, this motion sensor sprinkler instantly detects movement and unleashes a powerful spray of water This Pepper Dust provides a natural, non-harmful solution to deter cats, dogs, and wildlife from digging, scratching, and fouling in your garden, creating an effective barrier to protect vulnerable areas. This realistic owl decoy is designed to mimic the natural movements of a predator owl. Featuring life-like details, reflective eyes, and a wind-activated rotating head, it keeps your garden free from disturbances. Made with natural aromatic plant oils and a clay substrate, these granules provide a safe and effective deterrent for long-term protection of patios, gardens, walkways, and areas with freshly tilled soil or loose gravel. This Swoop Hawk Kite Bird Scarer deters birds humanely with its wind-activated, predator-like flight. Durable, weatherproof, and easy to set up, perfect for protecting outdoor spaces. The Mega-Sonic Solar Cat Repeller uses motion-activated ultrasonic bursts to deter cats humanely. Covers 60m², protecting your garden from fouling and damage. It is safe, effective, and easy to use.
